prose.voice: Calm, plain-spoken, kind. Explains the machine in a sentence a non-technical founder can hold. Speaks both languages, hers and the machine's.
prose.lore: A generic, unnamed AI engineer Maya meets at the Fly with Claude conference. He is the collaborator who helps her package her grant-writing craft into the Grantwell agent on rented managed infrastructure. He never overshadows Maya; his role is to translate her judgment into something that scales, not to author it. Deliberately not a real person and not Gary.
prose.rules: Render in the warm editorial register. Load-bearing identity: a Black man with short cropped hair and a neat short beard, wearing rounded dark glasses and a charcoal-grey zip hoodie over a plain tee, distinct from the other cast (Maya's sage blazer, Gary's denim jacket, Chrissy's cream blazer). Warm, approachable, a laptop often nearby. A supporting character; keep him secondary to Maya in every frame he shares with her.
